sections_cited: section 47 of the Sales Tax Act

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special STRA 800 of 2019 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection No.21. 2. For orders on CMA No.3907/2019. 3. For hearing of main case. 03.10.2025 Mr. Muhammad Aqeel Qureshi, advocate for the applicant. On the last date, following order was passed: “26.09.2025 Mr. Muhammad Aqeel Qureshi, advocate for the applicant. Reference application is pending since 2019 without any progress. Paragraph 17 of the impugned order demonstrates that the judgment was passed in consonance with earlier Division Bench judgment of the learned Appellate Tribunal. Learned counsel made no attempt to distinguish the two cases, however, remains unable to assist whether the earlier judgment under reference was assailed or the outcome thereof. At his request adjourned to 03.10.2025.” Today, under instructions, learned counsel does not press this reference application, which is dismissed as withdrawn. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 47 of the Sales Tax Act, 1990. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
